revision.text:
{{Mbox | name = Notice | demospace = {{{demospace|}}} | type = {{{type|notice}}} | small = {{#if:{{{small|}}}|{{{small}}}|{{#if:{{{section|}}}|left}}}} | style = {{#if:{{{small|}}}||{{#if:{{{section|}}}|{{Main other|width:auto;|demospace={{{demospace|}}}}}}}}} | image = [[File:{{#if:{{{image|}}}|{{{image}}}|{{#switch:{{{3|{{{style}}}}}} | stop = OOjs UI icon cancel-destructive.svg | warning = OOjs UI icon error-destructive.svg | question = OOjs UI icon helpNotice-ltr-progressive.svg | attention = OOjs UI icon alert-destructive.svg | important = OOjs UI icon notice-warning.svg | search = OOjs UI icon search-ltr-progressive.svg | fix = Icon Maintenance.svg | announce = Echo feedback.svg | help = OOjs UI icon map-ltr-progressive.svg | idea = OOjs UI icon lightbulb-yellow.svg | news = OOjs UI icon newspaper-ltr-progressive.svg | propose = Icons8 flat collaboration.svg | #default = OOjs_UI_icon_information-progressive.svg}}}}|40x40px|link=|alt=]] | smallimage = [[File:{{#if:{{{image|}}}|{{{image}}}|{{#switch:{{{3|{{{style}}}}}} | stop = OOjs UI icon cancel-destructive.svg | warning = OOjs UI icon error-destructive.svg | question = OOjs UI icon helpNotice-ltr-progressive.svg | attention = OOjs UI icon alert-destructive.svg | important = OOjs UI icon notice-warning.svg | search = OOjs UI icon search-ltr-progressive.svg | fix = Icon Maintenance.svg | announce = Echo feedback.svg | help = OOjs UI icon map-ltr-progressive.svg | idea = OOjs UI icon lightbulb-yellow.svg | news = OOjs UI icon newspaper-ltr-progressive.svg | propose = Icons8 flat collaboration.svg | #default = OOjs_UI_icon_information-progressive.svg}}}}|30x30px|link=|alt=]] | text = {{#if:{{{header|}}}|
'''{{{header}}}'''
}}{{#if:{{{title|{{{2|}}}}}}|'''{{{title|{{{2}}}}}}'''：}}{{{text|{{{1|}}}}}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing these ahead in time so that it does not mess up
1 revision imported: importing everything for the citation needed templates

revision.text: {{{1}}}
{{{1}}}
{{{1}}}

revision.comment: new design as taken from [[User:ClockworkSoul/Templates/comment]] and [[WP:TS]]

revision.text: {| class="messagebox standard-talk" |- |align="center"|[[Image:Info-icon.png|Comment]] |align="left" width="100%"|{{{1}}} |}<noinclude> [[ca:Template:Avís]]</noinclude>

{| class="messagebox standard-talk" |- |align="center"|[[Image:Info-icon.png|Comment]] |align="left" width="100%"|{{{1}}} |}<noinclude> __NOTOC__
==Location== This template should be used for '''important''' comments about an article that cannot be shown using a more specific template. Unimportant comments should use the usual, non-templated method.
==Usage== '''<nowiki>{{Notice|Include text here.}}</nowiki>'''
==See also== [[Template:Warning]]
[[ca:Template:Avís]]</noinclude>

{| class="messagebox standard-talk" |- |align="center"|[[Image:Info-icon.png|Comment]] |align="left" width="100%"|{{{1}}} |}<noinclude> __NOTOC__
==Location== This template should be used for '''important''' comments about an article that cannot be shown using a more specific template. Unimportant comments should use the usual, non-templated method.
==Usage== '''<nowiki>{{Notice|Include text here.}}</nowiki>'''
==See also== {{Warning}}
[[ca:Template:Avís]]</noinclude>

{| class="messagebox standard-talk" |- |align="center"|[[Image:Info-icon.png|Comment]] |align="left" width="100%"|{{{1}}} |}<noinclude> __NOTOC__
==Location== This template should be used for '''important''' comments about an article that cannot be shown using a more specific template. Unimportant comments should use the usual, non-templated method.
==Usage== '''<nowiki>{{Notice|Include text here.}}</nowiki>'''
==See also== {{tl|Warning}}
[[ca:Template:Avís]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: this image is ugly. i can't find a nicer one. so just remove.

==Location== This template should be used for '''important''' comments about an article that cannot be shown using a more specific template. Unimportant comments should use the usual, non-templated method.

revision.comment: Switched to SVG version of information icon
revision.text:
{| class="messagebox standard-talk" |- |align="center"|[[Image:Information_icon.svg|Comment]] |align="left" width="100%"|{{{1}}} |}<noinclude> __NOTOC__
==Location== This template should be used for '''important''' comments about an article that cannot be shown using a more specific template. Unimportant comments should use the usual, non-templated method.
==Usage== '''<nowiki>{{Notice|Include text here.}}</nowiki>'''
==See also== {{tl|Warning}}
[[ca:Template:Avís]][[zh-yue:Template:Notice]]</noinclude>

{| class="messagebox standard-talk" |- |align="center"|[[Image:Info-icon.png|Comment]] |align="left" width="100%"|{{{1}}} |} __NOTOC__ ==Location== This template should be used for '''important''' comments about an article that cannot be shown using a more specific template. Unimportant comments should use the usual, non-templated method. ==Usage== '''{{Notice|Include text here.}}''' ==See also== {{tl|Consensus}}
{{tl|Warning}} [[ca:Template:Avís]][[zh-yue:Template:Notice]]

{| class="messagebox standard-talk" |- |align="center"|[[Image:Info-icon.png|Comment]] |align="left" width="100%"|{{{1}}} |} __NOTOC__ ==Location== This template should be used for '''important''' comments about an article that cannot be shown using a more specific template. Unimportant comments should use the usual, non-templated method. ==Usage== '''{{Notice|Include text here.}}''' ==See also== {{tl|Consensus}}
{{tl|Warning}} [[ca:Template:Avís]][[ka:თარგი:შეტყობინება]][[zh-yue:Template:Notice]]

revision.comment: Switched PNG with SVG - looks much better. Kept gold (against better judgment)
revision.text:
{| class="messagebox standard-talk" |- |align="center"|[[Image:Information_icon.svg|Comment]] |align="left" width="100%"|{{{1}}} |} __NOTOC__ ==Location== This template should be used for '''important''' comments about an article that cannot be shown using a more specific template. Unimportant comments should use the usual, non-templated method. ==Usage== '''{{Notice|Include text here.}}''' ==See also== {{tl|Consensus}}

Unimportant comments should use the usual, non-templated method. ==Usage== '''{{Notice|Include text here.}}''' ==See also== {{tl|Consensus}}

Unimportant comments should use the usual, non-templated method. ==Usage== '''{{Notice|Include text here.}}''' ==See also== {{tl|Consensus}}

{| class="messagebox standard-talk" |- |align="center"|[[Image:Information_icon.svg|55px|Comment]] |align="left" width="100%"|{{{1}}} |} __NOTOC__ ==Location== This template should be used for '''important''' comments about an article that cannot be shown using a more specific template. Unimportant comments should use the usual, non-templated method. ==Usage== '''{{Notice|Include text here.}}''' ==See also== {{tl|Consensus}}

revision.comment: added code to automatically use talk page coloring only on talk pages and display the icon with correct background coloring for most users
revision.text:
{| class="{{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}|Category talk|Help talk|Image talk|MediaWiki talk|Portal talk|Talk|Template talk|User talk|Wikipedia talk=messagebox standard-talk|messagebox}}" |- |align="center"|[[Image:Info {{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}|Category talk|Help talk|Image talk|MediaWiki talk|Portal talk|Talk|Template talk|User talk|Wikipedia talk=|non-}}talk.png|Info]] |align="left" width="100%"|{{{1}}} |} __NOTOC__ ==Location== This template should be used for '''important''' comments about an article that cannot be shown using a more specific template. Unimportant comments should use the usual, non-templated method. ==Usage== '''{{Notice|Include text here.}}''' ==See also== {{tl|Consensus}}
{{tl|Warning}} [[ca:Template:Avís]][[ka:თარგი:შეტყობინება]][[zh-yue:Template:Notice]]

revision.comment: update; added small parameter, changed switch to ifeq, added optional parameter header

revision.text:
{| class="messagebox standard-talk" |- |align="center"|[[Image:Information_icon.svg|55px|Comment]] |align="left" width="100%"|{{{1}}} |}<noinclude> __NOTOC__
==Location== This template should be used for '''important''' comments about an article that cannot be shown using a more specific template. Unimportant comments should use the usual, non-templated method.
==Usage== :{{tlx|Notice|Include text here.}} :{{tlx|Notice|small=yes|Include text here.}} for smaller type :{{tlx|Notice|header=Header text|Include text here.}} for an aditional header ==See also== :{{tlx|Consensus}} :{{tlx|Warning}} :{{tlx|Caution}}
[[ca:Template:Avís]][[ka:თარგი:შეტყობინება]][[zh-yue:Template:Notice]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: testing the svg image, should work
reverted to the PNG versions of the icon, which I created because the SVG version renders improperly in IE6
Obvious image size fix for "small" option; rm. useless __NOTOC__; declutter transwikis; add missing cat.
That was a little too small.
changing to SVG. And as I'm using IE 6.0 for this edit, I say: no problem!
Width does not validate in HTML Strict mode, replaced with CSS value, removed "Example Text" from the box
Trying an "if" parser function, if this doesn't work I can revert it - see sandbox
OK, so this doesn't work, reverse this
thin to combat talk page overboxage
reducing the size of the image a bit. I see the "small" parameter but as used this doesn't need smaller print, just less vertical space lost to the image.
Updating template per editprotected on talk by [[User:Davidgothberg|David Göthberg]]
per EP on talk; will go make sure everything still works
Updating to use {{mbox}}. Still supports all the old parameters.
add passthrough of style and textstyle, per EP request. also tidy whitespace
minor markup fixes. no output impact
simplified subst parameter for aesthetics and compatibility with the syntax highlighter gadget
Per edit request on talk page.
added option for shortcuts to be added to the template - tested on [[Template:Notice/sandbox]]
Undid revision 601821049 by [[Special:Contributions/Steel1943|Steel1943]] ([[User talk:Steel1943|talk]]) Oops - I was beat to it!
working around misuse of "header" (it's a heading); don't make people try to memorize the incorrect usage to use this template

TESTED - updated the template so that the user can have the option to use the "imageright" or the "shortcut" parameter, but gave the "imageright" parameter priority over the "shortcut" parameter - better give the editors options, rather than save bits
Retain default width (80%) before any extra {{{style}}}
merging features from [[Template:Warning]]; the lack of consistency between these two has been frustrating for a long time.
partial revert per BRD, previous default was left-aligned
implemented |center= as suggested on talk page (keeps left as default)
enable heading to be styled separately
make |align= work as it normally does in other templates
remove extra curly brace per protected edit request
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23035542121|commit triggered pipeline]]
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23035542121|commit triggered pipeline]]
1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue
1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
